subcodes.first_line: The Book from God unto them that dwell in the heavens and on the earth: Gaze ye upon naught save My Beauty, the Radiant, the Resplendent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من الله الی من فی السموات و الارضین ان لاتنظروا الا جمالی المشرق المنیر
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
